---
title: "testing"
output: html_document
date: "2025-08-18"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "~/projects/021_ltee_models/NeutralKaryotypes/")
```



```{r}
require(DBI)
source("R/db_utils.R")
dbvars <- load_db_vars("db_creds.txt")
db <- dbConnect(
    MariaDB(),
    host = dbvars["HOST"],
    user = dbvars["USER"],
    password = dbvars["PASSWORD"],
    dbname = dbvars["DBNAME"]
)

x <- dbGetQuery(db, "SELECT * FROM Passaging")
m <- dbGetQuery(db,"SELECT * FROM Media")
db_col <- collapse_db(x) 

saveRDS(db_col,"core_data/db_col.Rds")
```

```{r}
ids <- unique(readLines("karyotyped_samples.txt"))
ids <- intersect(ids, db_col$samples$samples)

sample_map <- db_col$samples[match(ids, db_col$samples$samples), , drop = FALSE]
sample_map <- unique(sample_map[, c("samples", "passage_id")])
sample_map <- sample_map[order(sample_map$passage_id, sample_map$samples), ] 
print(sample_map)

passaging_tbl <- db_col$passaging
parent_of <- setNames(passaging_tbl$passage_from, passaging_tbl$passage_id)
unmapped_passage_ids <- setdiff(unique(sample_map$passage_id), passaging_tbl$passage_id)
if (length(unmapped_passage_ids) > 0) {
  warning(length(unmapped_passage_ids),
          " sampled passage_id values are absent from db_col$passaging and will be skipped.")
}

find_passage_ancestors <- function(passage_id, parent_map) {
  out <- character()
  cur <- passage_id
  while (!is.null(cur) && !is.na(cur)) {
    out <- c(cur, out)
    if (!(cur %in% names(parent_map))) break
    cur <- unname(parent_map[cur])
  }
  out
}

getfrom <- function(id) x$passaged_from_id1[x$id==id]
tmp <- "MDA-MB-231_P_A2_seed" 
tmp%in%db_col$passaging$passage_id
find_passage_ancestors(tmp,parent_of)
tmp_v <- c(tmp)
while(!is.na(tmp_v[1])){
  tmp_v <- c(getfrom(tmp_v[1]),tmp_v)
}

sampled_passage_ids <- setdiff(unique(sample_map$passage_id), unmapped_passage_ids)
passage_paths <- setNames(
  lapply(sampled_passage_ids, find_passage_ancestors, parent_map = parent_of),
  sampled_passage_ids
)
root_id <- vapply(passage_paths, function(path) path[1], character(1))

connected_passage_sets <- split(sampled_passage_ids, root_id)
connected_sample_sets <- lapply(connected_passage_sets, function(pids) {
  sample_map$samples[sample_map$passage_id %in% pids]
})

build_component_tree <- function(component_passage_ids, path_map, passaging_tbl, sample_map) {
  subtree_nodes <- sort(unique(unlist(path_map[component_passage_ids])))
  subtree_edges <- passaging_tbl[
    passaging_tbl$passage_id %in% subtree_nodes,
    c("passage_id", "passage_from"),
    drop = FALSE
  ]
  subtree_samples <- sample_map[sample_map$passage_id %in% subtree_nodes, , drop = FALSE]

  list(
    sampled_passage_ids = sort(component_passage_ids),
    sampled_ids = sort(unique(subtree_samples$samples[subtree_samples$passage_id %in% component_passage_ids])),
    tree_passage_ids = subtree_nodes,
    tree_edges = subtree_edges[order(subtree_edges$passage_id), , drop = FALSE],
    tree_samples = subtree_samples[order(subtree_samples$passage_id, subtree_samples$samples), , drop = FALSE]
  )
}

connected_trees <- lapply(connected_passage_sets, build_component_tree,
                          path_map = passage_paths,
                          passaging_tbl = passaging_tbl,
                          sample_map = sample_map)

component_summary <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(connected_trees), function(i) {
  tree <- connected_trees[[i]]
  data.frame(
    component = names(connected_trees)[i],
    n_sampled_passages = length(tree$sampled_passage_ids),
    n_sampled_ids = length(tree$sampled_ids),
    n_tree_passages = length(tree$tree_passage_ids),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))
print(component_summary)

# Example access:
# connected_trees[[1]]$tree_edges
# connected_trees[[1]]$tree_samples
```

```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
source("R/plot_utils.R")

tree_plots <- lapply(seq_along(connected_trees), function(i) {
  plot_passage_tree(
    connected_trees[[i]],
    component_name = names(connected_trees)[i]
  )
})
names(tree_plots) <- names(connected_trees)

invisible(lapply(tree_plots, print))

```


```{r}
# Infer simulation intervals directly from the passaging graph.
# For each pair of sampled endpoints, identify their MRCA in the passaging graph.
# The sampled endpoint that is closer to that MRCA is used as a proxy for the
# ancestral karyotype, while the other endpoint is treated as the descendant.

ids <- intersect(ids, x$id)
parent_of <- setNames(x$passaged_from_id1, x$id)

find_all_ancestors <- function(id, parent_map) {
  out <- character()
  cur <- id
  while (!is.null(cur) && !is.na(cur)) {
    out <- c(cur, out)
    cur <- parent_map[[cur]]
  }
  out
}

sampled_ancestors <- setNames(
  lapply(ids, find_all_ancestors, parent_map = parent_of),
  ids
)

shared_prefix_length <- function(path1, path2) {
  n <- min(length(path1), length(path2))
  if (n == 0) return(0L)
  matches <- path1[seq_len(n)] == path2[seq_len(n)]
  if (all(matches)) return(as.integer(n))
  as.integer(which(!matches)[1] - 1)
}

build_pair_mapping <- function(sample1, sample2, ancestor_map, passaging_df) {
  path1 <- ancestor_map[[sample1]]
  path2 <- ancestor_map[[sample2]]

  shared_len <- shared_prefix_length(path1, path2)
  if (shared_len < 1) return(NULL)

  mrca_id <- path1[shared_len]
  steps1 <- length(path1) - shared_len - 1L
  steps2 <- length(path2) - shared_len - 1L

  if (steps1 <= steps2) {
    ancestor_proxy_sample <- sample1
    descendant_sample <- sample2
    collapsed_steps <- steps1
    descendant_steps <- steps2
  } else {
    ancestor_proxy_sample <- sample2
    descendant_sample <- sample1
    collapsed_steps <- steps2
    descendant_steps <- steps1
  }

  delta_pass <- passaging_df$passage[passaging_df$id == descendant_sample] -
    passaging_df$passage[passaging_df$id == mrca_id]
  if (length(delta_pass) != 1 || is.na(delta_pass) || delta_pass <= 0) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  list(
    sample1 = sample1,
    sample2 = sample2,
    mrca_id = mrca_id,
    sample1_steps_from_mrca = steps1,
    sample2_steps_from_mrca = steps2,
    ancestor_proxy_sample = ancestor_proxy_sample,
    descendant_sample = descendant_sample,
    collapsed_steps = collapsed_steps,
    descendant_steps_from_mrca = descendant_steps,
    delta_pass = delta_pass
  )
}

pair_ids <- if (length(ids) >= 2) combn(ids, 2, simplify = FALSE) else list()
id_map <- lapply(pair_ids, function(pair) {
  build_pair_mapping(pair[1], pair[2], sampled_ancestors, x)
})
id_map <- id_map[!sapply(id_map, is.null)]

interval_rows <- lapply(id_map, function(z) {
  data.frame(
    sample1 = z$sample1,
    sample2 = z$sample2,
    mrca_id = z$mrca_id,
    ancestor_proxy_sample = z$ancestor_proxy_sample,
    descendant_sample = z$descendant_sample,
    collapsed_steps = z$collapsed_steps,
    descendant_steps_from_mrca = z$descendant_steps_from_mrca,
    delta_pass = z$delta_pass,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
})
if (!length(interval_rows)) {
  interval_df <- data.frame(
    sample1 = character(),
    sample2 = character(),
    mrca_id = character(),
    ancestor_proxy_sample = character(),
    descendant_sample = character(),
    collapsed_steps = numeric(),
    descendant_steps_from_mrca = numeric(),
    delta_pass = numeric(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
} else {
  interval_df <- do.call(rbind.data.frame, c(interval_rows, make.row.names = FALSE))
  interval_df <- unique(interval_df)
  interval_df$sample1 <- as.character(interval_df$sample1)
  interval_df$sample2 <- as.character(interval_df$sample2)
  interval_df$mrca_id <- as.character(interval_df$mrca_id)
  interval_df$ancestor_proxy_sample <- as.character(interval_df$ancestor_proxy_sample)
  interval_df$descendant_sample <- as.character(interval_df$descendant_sample)
  interval_df$collapsed_steps <- as.numeric(interval_df$collapsed_steps)
  interval_df$descendant_steps_from_mrca <- as.numeric(interval_df$descendant_steps_from_mrca)
  interval_df$delta_pass <- as.numeric(interval_df$delta_pass)
  interval_df <- interval_df[
    order(interval_df$ancestor_proxy_sample, interval_df$descendant_sample),
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]
}
print(interval_df)

```

```{r}
karyotype_ids <- unique(unlist(lapply(id_map, function(z) {
  c(z$ancestor_proxy_sample, z$descendant_sample)
})))
karyotypes <- get_karyotyping(karyotype_ids)
```

```{r}
source("R/estimate_pmis.R")


fit_objects <- lapply(id_map,function(id){
  
  id$id_start <- id$mrca_id
  id$id_start_proxy <- id$ancestor_proxy_sample
  id$id_end <- id$descendant_sample
  
  id$K0 <- do.call(rbind,karyotypes$karyotype[karyotypes$id==id$id_start_proxy])
  if(!id$id_end%in%karyotypes$id){
    print(id$id_end)
    return(NULL)
  }
  id$KT <- do.call(rbind,karyotypes$karyotype[karyotypes$id==id$id_end])
  
  id$H0 <- hist_mat_from_matrix(round(id$K0))
  id$HT <- hist_mat_from_matrix(round(id$KT))
  
  id
})
fit_objects <- fit_objects[!sapply(fit_objects,is.null)]
saveRDS(fit_objects,"fit_objects.Rds")
```

```{r}
ff <- list.files("data/fits/",full.names = T)

df <- do.call(rbind,lapply(ff,function(fi){
  res <- readRDS(fi)
  if(!"test_null_res"%in%names(res)) return(NULL)
  print(res$id_start)
  data.frame(start=res$id_start,end=res$id_end,p=res$test_null_res$empp,delta_pass=res$delta_pass)
}))
df <- df[order(df$p),]

data.table::fwrite(df,"data/neutral_probability.csv",sep=",")

```

```{r}
x <- readRDS("data/fits/SNU-668_C_A4_seed.Rds")
y <- readRDS("data/pops/SNU-668_C_A4_seed.Rds")
```


```{r}
KT <- round(x$KT)
image(hist_mat_from_named_counts(y[[1]]))
image(x$H0)
image(x$HT)
pop <- y[1:50]

library(transport)
  
  sampleToInt <- function(pp, Nsam=20) {
    samstr <- sample(names(pp), size = Nsam, prob = pp)
    samstr <- table(samstr)
    # Ensure consistent matrix dimensions for 22 chromosomes/bins
    coords <- matrix(as.numeric(unlist(strsplit(names(samstr), split="[.]"))), ncol=22, byrow = TRUE)
    list(coords = coords, counts = samstr)
  }
  
  Nsam <- nrow(KT)
  
  # Process Target (KT)
  samstr <- table(apply(KT, 1, paste, collapse="."))
  smm <- list(
    coords = matrix(as.numeric(unlist(strsplit(names(samstr), split="[.]"))), ncol=22, byrow = TRUE),
    counts = samstr
  )
  wtst <- wpp(smm$coords, mass = smm$counts)
  
  # 1. Internal distances (Null distribution)
  dnull <- sapply(1:length(pop), function(i) {
    sapply(1:length(pop), function(j) {
      if (i >= j) return(NaN)
      
      popi <- sampleToInt(pop[[i]], Nsam)
      popj <- sampleToInt(pop[[j]], Nsam)
      
      wi <- wpp(popi$coords, mass = popi$counts)
      wj <- wpp(popj$coords, mass = popj$counts)
      
      wasserstein(wi, wj)
    })
  })
  dnull <- dnull[is.finite(dnull)]
  
  # 2. Test distances (Populations vs Target)
  dtst <- sapply(1:length(pop), function(j) {
    popj <- sampleToInt(pop[[j]], Nsam)
    
    wj <- wpp(popj$coords, mass = popj$counts)
    wasserstein(wj, wtst)
  })
  
  tst_stat <- median(dtst)
  empp <- mean(dnull > tst_stat)

```
